Current Treasurer duty area: Maintain church accounts and financial records securely.. Recommended primary home: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Daily organization is operational; Treasurer and Finance Committee should review access and retention.. Open questions: Where should official records live and who has access?. Current Treasurer duty area: Preserve digital and physical records with backups.. Recommended primary home: Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Finance Committee. Reason for split: File maintenance is operational; retention/backups should follow Finance policy.. Open questions: What records retention schedule should KBC adopt?. Current Treasurer duty area: Provide records for annual audit/review.. Recommended primary home: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Supporting roles / bodies: Bookkeeper, Finance Committee, outside accounting vendor. Reason for split: Treasurer coordinates accountability; Bookkeeper provides records; Finance owns audit/review process.. Open questions: Will review be internal, external, or CPA-led?. Current Treasurer duty area: Be bonded if required by bylaws.. Recommended primary home: Treasurer / Financial Officer. Supporting roles / bodies: Personnel Committee, Finance Committee. Reason for split: Bonding follows the elected role and risk controls.. Open questions: Do bylaws currently require bonding, and does insurance coverage exist?. Current Treasurer duty area: Complete background check and safety/security compliance.. Recommended primary home: Personnel Committee. Supporting roles / bodies: Treasurer, Nominating Committee. Reason for split: Background-check process is personnel/eligibility administration.. Open questions: What process applies to elected officers versus employees or volunteers?. Current Treasurer duty area: Annual written evaluation using Treasurer framework.. Recommended primary home: Personnel Committee. Supporting roles / bodies: Finance Committee, Treasurer, Congregation if required. Reason for split: Personnel should administer evaluation process; Finance should provide financial performance/control input.. Open questions: Who performs the evaluation of an elected officer, and how does that align with bylaws?.
